name: The Acro parlour
description:
You stand in a huge circular room.  Surrounding you are numerous wooden benches
occupied by hobbits and strange-looking humans.  All of them seem to be paying
attention to a really fat hobbit lad standing alone in the middle of the hall.
On the walls are pictures of past Acro champions and a list of scheduled games.
Welcome to the Acro hall!  A huge chalkboard is attached to the door you might
be able to learn a thing or two by reading it.
